hero.title: Rent Your Premium Car in Tunisia.
hero.subtitle: Experience comfort, style, and reliability across Tunis, Hammamet, Sousse, and Djerba. Free Airport Delivery available.

fleet.title: Our Premium Fleet
fleet.subtitle: Choose from our diverse range of well-maintained vehicles for any occasion.

features.title: Airport Delivery
features.desc: Free delivery to Tunis-Carthage Airport and fast processing.

features.title: Clean Vehicles
features.desc: Every car is thoroughly checked and sanitized before rental.

features.title: Flexible Caution
features.desc: Cash or check accepted for vehicle deposit. No credit card required.

booking.title: Complete Your Booking
booking.bookingSuccessMsg: Our team will call you shortly to confirm availability.
booking.failed: Failed to send request. Please try again.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Got questions? We have answers.
faq.q1: What do I need to rent a car?
faq.a1: You need a valid driver's license and a CIN card or passport. A cash or check deposit is also required upon delivery.
faq.a2: Yes, we offer free delivery to Tunis-Carthage Airport. We can also deliver to other locations across Tunisia for a small fee.
faq.a3: You can cancel your booking for free up to 48 hours before the pickup time. Late cancellations may be subject to a fee.
faq.a4: No, we believe in transparent pricing. The price you see is the price you pay. The deposit is fully refundable.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Don't just take our word for it.
testimonials.1: Great service! They delivered the car right to Tunis airport. The process was fast and the car was very clean.
testimonials.2: Reliable and affordable. I rented a sedan for a week and had zero issues. Highly recommend MTN Rent Car!
testimonials.3: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees. The customer support was very helpful when I needed to extend my rental.
